data.raceComments: {"comment":"2. REIGN MAKER has been tackling stronger opposition than this of late and while down the track in his last two outings at Penrith he did a good job to come from wider for a 1.5m second at Menangle three back. In a new yard and looks well served by this barrier. 3. IM NO GIFT has not raced for four-and-a-half months but looks forward enough for the return after a minor placing in a recent trial. Likely to get the favours from this nice draw. 10. COUNTRY MAJOR deserves a win following a string of top-three finishes. Draws on the back row but came from there to place the last two times he raced at this venue. 4. GALVARINO was a beaten favourite last time but is a player if he shows the form that saw him kick off the campaign with a second at this venue last month.","runners":[2,3,10,4],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
